/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/robot_model_rx200_test.dir/tests/robot_model_rx200.cpp.o -o robot_model_rx200_test  libproject4.a ../lib/linux-aarch64/libproject3.a ../lib/linux-aarch64/libproject2.a ../lib/linux-aarch64/libproject1.a /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libgtest_main.a /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libgtest.a
